cit.basis: CIT 20% on non-GCC (foreign) ownership share of profit; Zakat 2.5% on Saudi/GCC ownership share of the Zakat base.
cit.note: Administered by ZATCA. Special extractive-sector rates are out of scope for this SME estimator.

wht.note: Withholding tax on payments to non-residents; rates vary by payment type and treaty.

vat.note: VAT raised from 5% to 15% effective 1 July 2020.

personal_income_tax.note: No personal income tax on employment income.

gosi.note: General Organization for Social Insurance (GOSI); SANED unemployment insurance included for Saudi nationals.

official_sources.name: ZATCA — Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Zakat is modelled as a proxy on owner-share profit; the true Zakat base includes adjusted net worth items.
Ownership blend, extractive-sector rates, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode the full Zakat base computation, deductions, exemptions, treaties, or filing rules.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
